$schema_note: Resolver regression test vector for BIZ-PAGES-PROD-DETANGLE-002. One canonical premium slug. Baseline_broken values reflect the resolver behaviour observed in the current repo (S1 baseline). Expected_unified values reflect the contract S3 Worker A is unifying on: a single worker-fronted asset path documented in /job_site/resolver_contract_spec.md and /job_site/cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §3.

primary_demo.bucket_name: ASSUMED — declared on Cloudflare dashboard only; recorded in /job_site/cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §4.3 as one of biz-pages-demo / bizpages-demo / studio-bundles / demo

tenants_fallback_not_used_for_this_slug.behaviour_for_this_fixture: skipped because DEMO_BUCKET hit returned a non-empty page; recorded only to document the fall-through ladder

legacy_fallback_not_used_for_this_slug.behaviour_for_this_fixture: skipped because DEMO_BUCKET path resolved first

baseline_broken.computation_path: resolveAssetCode(slug) sanitises slug; the sanitised slug is substituted for {assetCode}; the wallpaper code w91 is NEVER consumed
baseline_broken.render_consumer: PageShell at apps/product-shell/src/components/layout/PageShell.tsx is invoked with zero props (see /job_site/wallpaper_renderer_fault_report.md §2.2 Fault C); resolved value is never threaded in
baseline_broken.observable_effect: browser requests /wallpapers/acme-premium.png; static fallback /w99.png paints from AppShell (apps/product-shell/src/app/AppShell.tsx:8)
baseline_broken.result: BROKEN — wallpaper code dropped, slug used as code, default static asset rendered with background-size:contain (Fault A)

expected_unified.computation_path: code prefix w → wallpapers folder; remainder digits preserved; .png extension appended; served by Worker route /r2/* fronting TENANTS_BUCKET (cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §3.3 T4 hybrid)
expected_unified.render_consumer: DesktopPremiumReceiver mounted because shellId === desktop-premium-v1; wallpaperUrl threaded into layout.wallpaper; .dpv1Wallpaper paints background-size:cover at 2560×1440 stage
expected_unified.result: PASS — single contract resolves wallpaper code to a worker-fronted URL

resolver_cases.subject: sticker tile asset (exclusive tile content)
resolver_cases.input_origin: spec.exclusiveTiles[0].contentCode normalised by normalizeExclusiveTile at apps/product-shell/functions/_lib/runtime-schema.js:147 → assetCode validated against ["c","x"]

baseline_broken.computation_path: resolveAssetCode normalises the assetCode to lowercase alphanumeric and returns the raw code; no URL template is applied; sanitised string c1734 is what reaches resolvedImageSrc
baseline_broken.render_consumer: ExclusivePage at apps/product-shell/src/pages/ExclusivePage.tsx places resolvedImageSrc directly into ; browser resolves c1734 against current page URL
baseline_broken.result: BROKEN — assetCodeResolver returns a code, not a URL

expected_unified.computation_path: code prefix c → sticker-tiles folder; digits preserved; .png appended; same Worker route /r2/* fronting TENANTS_BUCKET
expected_unified.render_consumer: ExclusivePage tile consumes URL directly; tile renders the published asset
expected_unified.result: PASS — sticker tile code resolves to the worker-fronted URL via the same contract as wallpaper

resolver_cases.subject: missing asset (tile with no contentCode/contentUrl)
resolver_cases.input_origin: exclusiveTiles[2] — no contentCode, no assetCode, no contentUrl supplied
resolver_cases.carried_through: normalizeExclusiveTile generates fallback id EC-003 (apps/product-shell/functions/_lib/runtime-schema.js:120) and emits id only; no assetCode, no imageUrl

baseline_broken.computation_path: tile.imageUrl is null; tile.assetCode is undefined; resolvedImageSrc evaluates to null
baseline_broken.render_consumer: ExclusivePage receives null; tile is rendered as locked placeholder with no image
baseline_broken.result: PASS-AS-LOCKED — no broken image; the missing-asset case is benign in baseline because the resolver chain short-circuits to null before producing a bad URL

expected_unified.client_resolver: resolveAssetUrl returns null when input is empty/invalid (must not synthesise URLs from a slug or fallback string)
expected_unified.computation_path: no input → no URL; locked placeholder is shown; worker-fronted route is NOT invoked for an empty key
expected_unified.render_consumer: ExclusivePage tile renders the locked-state placeholder; no network request is issued
expected_unified.result: PASS — missing asset must remain a null/placeholder, not a 404 or a code-as-URL

resolver_cases.subject: worker-fronted bucket fetch for a wallpaper code via the unified contract
resolver_cases.input_origin: downstream of RC1; this case probes the network/worker path the resolver target URL is served from
resolver_cases.carried_through: browser issues GET against the resolver-produced URL

baseline_broken.served_by: Cloudflare Pages static asset handler under apps/product-shell/public/
baseline_broken.object_existence: no apps/product-shell/public/wallpapers/acme-premium.png exists; only w91.png, w92.png, w99.png exist directly under public/
baseline_broken.response: 404 from Pages static; no R2 lookup; SPA catch-all _redirects rule returns index.html with 200 if it precedes (it does not — _redirects rule is /* /index.html 200, but Pages serves the 404 first for missing static asset under non-SPA path); operator-visible result is the AppShell /w99.png default repainted on every page
baseline_broken.result: BROKEN — bucket is never consulted; static fallback masks the failure

expected_unified.served_by: Cloudflare Worker route /r2/* (worker-fronted bucket access — see /job_site/cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §3.3 T4 hybrid). Worker maps /r2/<folder>/<file> to env.TENANTS_BUCKET.get("<folder>/<file>") and streams bytes back
expected_unified.binding_consumed: TENANTS_BUCKET (worker-side; same logical R2 bucket as Pages Functions consume; binding name MUST match in worker dashboard metadata, recorded as U7 in cloudflare_runtime_notes.md §6)
expected_unified.response_200_path: stream R2 object body; content-type image/png; cache headers per worker policy
expected_unified.response_404_path: if object missing → Worker returns 404 with body { ok:false, error:"asset not found", details:{ key:"wallpapers/w91.png" } } (deterministic, no Pages static fallback)
expected_unified.result: PASS — wallpaper and sticker tiles share one worker-fronted bucket path; failures are observable as 404 with key, not as silent default-paint

expected_render_path.shellId_dispatch: router → DesktopPremiumReceiver because PublishedRuntimePage.shellId === "desktop-premium-v1" (per S2 patch and S3 client wiring)
expected_render_path.tile_grid: exclusiveTiles[].resolvedImageSrc populated via the unified resolver; Tile A uses /r2/sticker-tiles/c1734.png; Tile B uses its inline contentUrl unchanged; Tile C renders locked placeholder with imageUrl=null
expected_render_path.stage_metadata: stage.w=2560, stage.h=1440 consumed by useStageScale; receiver fits viewport with cover semantics, centred, no top-left clipping

regression_assertions: GET /api/published-page?slug=acme-premium&page=tier-2 returns ok:true, shellId="desktop-premium-v1", stage={w:2560,h:1440}, wallpaper="w91".
Compiler output exclusiveTiles[0].assetCode === "c1734" and exclusiveTiles[0].imageUrl === null.
Compiler output exclusiveTiles[1].imageUrl === "https://cdn.example.com/preview/tile-b.jpg" (inline contentUrl is preserved verbatim, never re-resolved).
Compiler output exclusiveTiles[2].id === "EC-003" with no assetCode field (missing-asset shape).
Worker-fronted /r2/wallpapers/w91.png returns 200 image/png from TENANTS_BUCKET when the object exists, and a JSON 404 with the missing key when it does not.
ExclusivePage no longer reads /wallpapers/.png; resolveWallpaper.ts is either deleted or rewired to call the unified resolver; resolveAssetCode is no longer used in any path.
